name: legal-services-codex
description: Installable Codex plugin for the full legal-services corpus: practice-area skills, partner-built skills, and managed-agent task packs.

interface.longDescription: Legal Services Codex installs the full Codex-adapted legal-services corpus from this repository as a real Codex plugin. It exposes practice-area legal skills, partner-built research skills, and Codex task-pack wrappers for the imported managed-agent workflows.
defaultPrompt: Use $00-legal-services-index to find the right legal-services skill for a task.
Use $01-commercial-legal-review to route and review an inbound commercial agreement.
Use $03-privacy-legal-dsar-response to draft a first-pass DSAR response.
